'''âm-ch-t''' ('''kamachat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quicksort|quicksort]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quicksort|quicksort]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kamachat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimachat|thimachat]] || [[word:jimachat|jimachat]] || [[word:shimachat|shimachat]] || [[word:kimachat|kimachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumachat|thuthumachat]] || [[word:jujumachat|jujumachat]] || [[word:shushumachat|shushumachat]] || [[word:kukumachat|kukumachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumachat|thumachat]] || [[word:jumachat|jumachat]] || [[word:shumachat|shumachat]] || [[word:kumachat|kumachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumachat|thumachat]] || [[word:jumachat|jumachat]] || [[word:shumachat|shumachat]] || [[word:kumachat|kumachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themachat|themachat]] || [[word:jemachat|jemachat]] || [[word:shemachat|shemachat]] || [[word:kemachat|kemachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomachat|thothomachat]] || [[word:jojomachat|jojomachat]] || [[word:shoshomachat|shoshomachat]] || [[word:kokomachat|kokomachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomachat|thomachat]] || [[word:jomachat|jomachat]] || [[word:shomachat|shomachat]] || [[word:komachat|komachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomachat|thomachat]] || [[word:jomachat|jomachat]] || [[word:shomachat|shomachat]] || [[word:komachat|komachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmachat|thĂŠmachat]] || [[word:jĂŠmachat|jĂŠmachat]] || [[word:shĂŠmachat|shĂŠmachat]] || [[word:kĂŠmachat|kĂŠmachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamachat|thathamachat]] || [[word:jajamachat|jajamachat]] || [[word:shashamachat|shashamachat]] || [[word:kakamachat|kakamachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamachat|thamachat]] || [[word:jamachat|jamachat]] || [[word:shamachat|shamachat]] || [[word:kamachat|kamachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamachat|thamachat]] || [[word:jamachat|jamachat]] || [[word:shamachat|shamachat]] || [[word:kamachat|kamachat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamachat|shamachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamachat|goshamachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamachat|gokishamachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamachatnĂŒ|shamachatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamachatnknĂŒ|goshamachatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachatnĂŒ|gokishamachatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamachatshĂ«|shamachatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamachatnkshĂ«|goshamachatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamachatshĂ«|gokishamachatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachatro|shamachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachatnkro|goshamachatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachatro|gokishamachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachatmu|shamachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachatnkmu|goshamachatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachatmu|gokishamachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamachatsher|shamachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamachatnksher|goshamachatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamachatsher|gokishamachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamachatng|shamachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamachatnkng|goshamachatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamachatng|gokishamachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamachatya|shamachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamachatnkya|goshamachatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamachatya|gokishamachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamachatyam|shamachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamachatnkyam|goshamachatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamachatyam|gokishamachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachatnĂŒshĂ«|shamachatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamachatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamachatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachatnĂŒro|shamachatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachatnknĂŒro|goshamachatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachatnĂŒro|gokishamachatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachatnĂŒmu|shamachatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachatnknĂŒmu|goshamachatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachatnĂŒmu|gokishamachatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachatshĂ«nĂŒ|shamachatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamachatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamachatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachatshĂ«ro|shamachatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachatnkshĂ«ro|goshamachatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachatshĂ«ro|gokishamachatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachatshĂ«mu|shamachatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachatnkshĂ«mu|goshamachatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachatshĂ«mu|gokishamachatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachatronĂŒ|shamachatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachatnkronĂŒ|goshamachatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachatronĂŒ|gokishamachatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachatroshĂ«|shamachatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachatnkroshĂ«|goshamachatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachatroshĂ«|gokishamachatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachatromu|shamachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachatnkromu|goshamachatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachatromu|gokishamachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachatmunĂŒ|shamachatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachatnkmunĂŒ|goshamachatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachatmunĂŒ|gokishamachatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachatmushĂ«|shamachatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachatnkmushĂ«|goshamachatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachatmushĂ«|gokishamachatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachatmuro|shamachatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachatnkmuro|goshamachatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachatmuro|gokishamachatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
